summary: Completed testing of CricketData.org API integration for IPL 2026. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend CricApiLivePanel works correctly on both MatchSelector (home page) and LiveMatch pages. API hit counter, progress bar, fetch button, and match cards all functioning as expected.

issues: Minor: Recharts console warning about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - cosmetic only, charts still render

passed_tests: GET /api/ returns version 4.0.0 and 'Gamble Consultant API'
GET /api/cricket-api/usage returns current day's API usage stats (hits, limit, remaining)
GET /api/cricket-api/cached returns cached match data without API hit
Cached matches contain IPL 2026 data with team names, venues, scores
Cached matches have innings scores with runs/wickets/overs
POST /api/cricket-api/fetch-live returns IPL 2026 matches with api_info
fetch-live response includes hits_today, hits_limit, hits_remaining
fetch-live response includes matches array with team names, innings scores, venue, status
GET /api/cricket-api/usage does NOT cost an API hit
GET /api/cricket-api/cached does NOT cost an API hit
Matches include team_info with shortname and img
Frontend MatchSelector shows CricApiLivePanel with hit counter
Frontend shows 'X / 100 hits used' counter with progress bar
Frontend shows 'Fetch Live IPL Details (1 API hit)' button
Clicking fetch button loads IPL matches and updates hit counter
Match cards are expandable and show innings scores
Frontend LiveMatch page has 'Live API' tab
Live API tab shows CricApiLivePanel with all features
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: 3 IPL matches cached from CricketData.org API (CSK vs PBKS, KKR vs SRH, LSG vs DC)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CricketData.org API integration fully working. Current API usage: 8/100 hits. The POST /api/cricket-api/fetch-live costs 1 API hit per call. GET /api/cricket-api/usage and GET /api/cricket-api/cached are free. 3 IPL matches currently cached (all completed). CricApiLivePanel component works on both MatchSelector and LiveMatch pages.

endpoints_tested.POST /api/cricket-api/fetch-live: PASS - Returns IPL matches with api_info
endpoints_tested.GET /api/cricket-api/cached: PASS - Returns cached matches without API hit

frontend_components.CricApiLivePanel: PASS - Shows on MatchSelector and LiveMatch pages
frontend_components.fetch_button: PASS - 'Fetch Live IPL Details (1 API hit)'
